author: SantiMod
content:
@here The Sandbox  Star Atlas

As you all know, there's an incredible partnership beginning between Star Atlas and Sandbox, and it's kicking off with a BIG competition!   

We want to check in with everyone and see what you've been creating. Head over to the ⁠unknown  channel and drop your entries! Let's see your creations!  

You can find more info on the contest and its prizes below - the 1st one is valued at $50,000 (at today's rates)!
https://sandboxgame.medium.com/star-atlas-voxedit-contest-c629f9fc180d
